title: LinkedFinancialAccount
description: A flexible account reference that can represent a ledger account (GL account), a bank account, or an employee payable account, depending on the connector's requirements.

id.title: Account ID
id.description: The unique identifier for the account. This can be a ledger account ID or bank account ID depending on the `type` field.

type.title: Account Type
type.description: The type of account being referenced. Use `ledger_account` for GL accounts from the chart of accounts, or `bank_account` for bank account entities. When not specified, the connector will use its default behavior.
